trackingsummarydata.subject: This week in A&S: Mini-museums on campus, new LA program for students
trackingsummarydata.title: FSSG - 02/02/26

urls.page_title: Fossiles to fortepianos: The Hill's 'mini-museums' and collections
urls.page_summary: The next time you visit Ithaca, check out exhibits on Chimes history, astronomical instruments, historical keyboards and so much more
urls.page_title: Cornell in Los Angeles: Info Sessions - Cornell
urls.page_summary: Cornell in Los Angeles is a new study away semester open to all Cornell undergraduate students! Spend the Spring 2027 semester in the global entertainment capital, earning Cornell class credits and having signature L.A. experiences offered by the ...
urls.page_title: Events boost student opportunities for career exploration
urls.page_summary: More than 150 students took advantage of winter break to jump start the career and internship process through A&S events.

Speaker: Diana Hernández, associate professor of sociolmedical sciences at Columbia University.
Powerless: The Hidden Hardship of Energy Insecurity in America
Description:
Energy serves as the lifeblood of our daily experiences. It permea...
urls.page_title: Gravitational wave signal tests Einstein’s theory of general relativity
urls.page_summary: When two black holes merge, the collision rings like a bell, emitting specific tones characterized by two numbers.
urls.page_title: Dallas Morse Coors Concert Series presents The Garifuna Collective - Cornell
urls.page_summary: The Garifuna Collective was co-founded and led by the late Andy Palacio in 2007. Today this group of accomplished, multi-generational Garifuna artists continues to tour and perform in Palacio’s memory and with his commitment to keeping Garifuna tr...
urls.page_title: Chemist Song Lin wins Snapdragon Prize
urls.page_summary: The award recognizes innovation in modern pharmaceutical discovery and manufacturing.
urls.page_title: Hemispheric Internment and Its Afterlives in Nikkei (2011) - Cornell
urls.page_summary:
Cancelled due to an emergency!
Although the internment of Japanese Americans during World War II following the invocation of the Enemy Aliens Act has been well documented, the parallel experiences of Latin Americans of Japanese descent remain ...
urls.page_title: Song Lin | Department of Chemistry and Chemical Biology
The College of Arts & Sciences, Cornell University
urls.page_summary: Liberal arts college at Cornell University. A home for exploration, discovery and imagination. Undergraduate, faculty excellence in research and education. Academic diversity in the humanities, biological sciences and discipline-based education.
